# Morpheidos Tech

> Morpheidos Tech is an engineering consultancy supporting complex mechanical product development across high-tech and energy industries.

Morpheidos Tech provides mechanical engineering support in product development, mechanical design, engineering analysis, and fluid and thermal systems.

## Main website

- [Morpheidos Tech](https://morpheidos.tech/): Official company website and overview of services, methods, capabilities, values, and contact information.

## Services

- Product development support
- Mechanical design
- Engineering analysis
- Fluid and thermal engineering
- Technical documentation and product validation

## Contact

- [Contact Morpheidos Tech](https://morpheidos.tech/#contact)
- [Founder’s professional website](https://hamed.morpheidos.tech/)
- [Source repository](https://github.com/hamedeo/Morpheidos_Tech)
